title: Israel renews strikes in southern Lebanon one day after ceasefire extension
subhed: Lebanon's National News Agency reported airstrikes on at least five villages in the south. The Israeli military launched the attack just one day after the two parties agreed to extend the truce by 45 days.

title: Cannes 2026: Why American cinema is not taking center stage on the Croisette this year

A smooth Trump-Xi summit masked deeper competing motives
subhed: By inviting Donald Trump, mired in his conflict with Iran, the Chinese president positioned himself as a symbol of stability in contrast to the turmoil fueled by Washington.

title: Pope Leo to visit France in September
subhed: The Vatican announced that the pope's state visit will take place from September 25 to 28. He is expected to visit Paris and Lourdes, in southwestern France.

title: Eurovision 2026: Israel's participation sparks controversy
subhed: In an unprecedented move, five countries – Spain, Ireland, Iceland, the Netherlands and Slovenia – are boycotting the event in protest over the presence of an Israeli contestant. Pro-Palestinian demonstrations are also planned in Vienna, where the final will be held on Saturday, May 16.

title: Thomas Piketty: 'The left must reconnect with its egalitarian ambitions of the past'
subhed: The divide between the Trumpist, merchant and nationalist right and the liberal Democratic left is largely artificial, argues economist Thomas Piketty. In his view, this story helps elites on both sides reinforce their hold over the working class and blocks the emergence of a genuine popular alternative.

How China is cracking down on its Christians
subhed: Le Monde verified footage from Chinese social media and collected testimonies from victims of Beijing's crackdown to reveal how the regime has brought independent churches to heel since Xi Jinping came to power.

title: Military researcher Céline Marangé on the Ukraine war: 'What is truly in danger is the future of European liberal democracy'
subhed: In an interview with Le Monde, the political scientist places the conflict in Ukraine within the long history of Russian imperialism and assesses the threat that the Kremlin poses to NATO and EU countries.

title: Trump, with ambitions for Mars, Canada and Greenland, tries to reclaim frontier myth of pioneer America
subhed: Since the very beginning, the US has based its growth on the conquest of new geographical or political frontiers. In this spirit, the current president speaks of other lands – on Earth and in space – while the rise of artificial intelligence opens up uncharted territories.
